Title: Place an order successfully
Step Action: Launch the URL https://demowebshop.tricentis.com/ in the browser.
Provide valid login credentials (Email: johnsmith@test.com, Password: xxx) and log in.
Step Expected: User logs into the application successfully.

Step Action: Click Books link in the left-most category menu.

Step Expected: Product is added to cart successfully.

Step Action: Click Shopping cart link in the top-right corner of the page.
Enter Billing Address (Country: Canada, City: Calgary, Zip: T2P1J9).
Step Expected: Billing address details are entered successfully.

Step Action: Verify order confirmation message is displayed.
Step Expected: The system displays order confirmation successfully.

Step Action: Click Logout link in the top-right corner of the page.
